notes: Telegram/backend publish times are reviewed as China time when timezone is missing
Internal webhook publish times are reviewed as China time when timezone is missing
Jin10 Chinese news timestamps are usually China time when timezone is missing
AICoin Chinese crypto feed timestamps are usually China time when timezone is missing
Cointelegraph exported timestamps are usually UTC; explicit Z still wins
Cryptonews exported timestamps are usually UTC; explicit Z still wins
Use UTC unless a source timestamp explicitly includes another timezone
US market/news local time if exported without timezone
US regulator local time if exported without timezone
US macro source local time if exported without timezone
